zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu於大約1183年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾申頓時，她的父親Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu25歲，母親Matilda de Warenne18歲。她和Raoul I of Lusignan至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1246年5月15日在法國多武-瑟艾福雷斯拉 莫特-賽吉賀雷享年64歲，埋葬在法國崔英德瑟艾福雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu于大约1183年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾申頓时，她的父亲Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu25岁，母亲Matilda de Warenne18岁。她和Raoul I of Lusignan至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1246年5月15日在法国多武-瑟艾福雷斯拉 莫特-賽吉賀雷享年64岁，埋葬在法国崔英德瑟艾福雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: d'Eu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Aleksander, Andrzej, Casimir, Ignacy, Jerzy, Krystyna, Krzysztof, Malgorzata, Mikolaj, Stanislaw, Tadeusz.
Polish: from a pet form of the personal name Dionizy, Polish form of Dionysius (see Dennis ).

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu was born about 1183, in Shenton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu, was 25 and her mother, Matilda de Warenne, was 18. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Raoul I of Lusignan. She died on 15 May 1246, in La Mothe-Saint-Héray, Deux-Sèvres, France, at the age of 64, and was buried in Sèvres, Indre, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu est née environ 1183, à Shenton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Warenne, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Raoul I of Lusignan. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1246, à La Mothe-Saint-Héray, Deux-Sèvres, France, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Sèvres, Indre, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu um 1183 in Shenton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu 25 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Warenne 18. Sie hatte mit Raoul I of Lusignan mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1246 im Alter von 64 Jahren in La Mothe-Saint-Héray, Deux-Sèvres, Frankreich und wurde in Sèvres, Indre, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Raoul I of Lusignan. Morì il 15 maggio 1246, nel La Mothe-Saint-Héray, Deux-Sèvres, Francia, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Sèvres, Indre, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix d'Eu Countess of Euが約1183年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアシェントンで生まれた時，父Henry d'Eu II, Count of Euは25歳，母Matilda de Warenneは18歳であった。彼女はRaoul I of Lusignanとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1246年5月15日にフランスデウクス-スevレスラ モスエ-サイント-heレイで64歳で死去し，フランスセントアインダースevレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu(이)가 대략 1183년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 셰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Warenne(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Raoul I of Lusignan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 5월 15일 프랑스 데우스-스e브레스 라 모테-세인트-he라이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 인드르 스e브레스에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Raoul I of Lusignan. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu родилась около 1183 г. в местности шентон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Warenne, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Raoul I of Lusignan. Она умерла 15 мая 1246 г. в местности ла моте-сеинт-хeреи, деукс-сeвресь, Франция в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности сeвресь, индр, кентр, Франция.
